title: Delicate Crisp Russian Beef Pilaf
description: A peppery, crisp, one-pot Russian dish featuring butter and lamination-puff, suitable for diabetics
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 5 minutes
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter to the skillet
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the rice to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly
Add the chicken broth, black pepper, salt, and paprika to the skillet
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the skillet
Simmer the pilaf for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender
